title: TidGi Workspace Configuration
description: Configuration file for TidGi workspace settings that sync across devices

id.description: Canonical workspace ID shared across devices

name.description: Custom display name for the workspace

tiddlywebUrl.description: Base URL of a remote TiddlyWiki NodeJS server (used when storageService is 'tiddlyweb'). No trailing slash.

tiddlywebRecipe.description: TiddlyWeb recipe name to sync against. Default TW server install uses 'default'.

tiddlywebUsername.description: Basic auth username for the TiddlyWeb server. Empty string means unauthenticated.

tiddlywebSyncIntervalMs.description: Interval in milliseconds between automatic TiddlyWeb sync passes.

tiddlywebExcludeFilter.description: TiddlyWiki filter expression. Tiddlers matching this filter are NOT synced with the TiddlyWeb server. Default excludes all system tiddlers ($:/...).

readOnlyMode.description: Enable read-only mode to prevent editing

enableFileSystemWatch.description: Enable file system watching for automatic reload

ignoreSymlinks.description: Ignore symbolic links when scanning wiki folder

syncOnStartup.description: Sync with Git repository on startup

disableAudio.description: Disable audio playback in this workspace

disableNotifications.description: Disable system notifications from this workspace

hibernateWhenUnused.description: Hibernate workspace when not in use to save resources

excludedPlugins.description: List of TiddlyWiki plugins to exclude

tagNames.description: Tag names for sub-wiki filtering (for sub-wikis only)

includeTagTree.description: Include entire tag tree when filtering tiddlers for sub-wikis

fileSystemPathFilterEnable.description: Enable custom file system path filter

fileSystemPathFilter.description: Custom TiddlyWiki filter for routing tiddlers to sub-wikis

rootTiddler.description: Root tiddler to display on startup

tlsKey.description: Path to TLS private key file

isSubWiki.description: Whether this wiki is a sub-wiki attached to a main wiki

mainWikiID.description: Canonical workspace ID of the main wiki this sub-wiki is attached to
